title: AI Content Repurposing Engine
subtitle: Turning one blog post into content for 7 platforms in under 30 seconds
problem: Content teams spend 2-3 hours turning a single blog post into social media content. They manually rewrite it for each platform, adjust the tone, add hashtags, and format for character limits. Multiply that by 3-4 posts per week and it's 8-12 hours of repetitive work — just on repurposing.
approach: Built a content extraction system that scrapes blog posts, pulls YouTube transcripts, and transcribes video/audio files using Whisper
Designed platform-specific AI prompts — each platform gets content that feels native, not the same text reformatted seven times
Integrated multiple AI models (Mistral, Groq, OpenAI, Anthropic) so users can choose based on quality and cost
Added RSS feed monitoring that auto-generates content when a new blog post goes live — zero manual work
Connected to n8n automation workflows for hands-free distribution to social media platforms

results.label: Per blog post, down from 2-3 hours

testimonial.quote: What used to take our content team half a day now takes 30 seconds. We paste a URL and get ready-to-post content for every platform. It changed how we think about content distribution entirely.
testimonial.name: Demo Project

title: AI Lead Generation Agent
subtitle: From company URL to personalized outreach email in 10 seconds
problem: Sales professionals spend 15-20 minutes researching each prospect before sending a cold email. They visit the company website, read through the pages, find a contact email, and write a personalized message from scratch. For 50 prospects, that's over 12 hours of manual research and writing.
approach: Built a web scraper that extracts company name, description, services, and team info from any public website
Developed smart email detection that finds contact emails from contact pages, footers, and mailto links — prioritizing personal emails over generic ones
Designed AI prompts that generate short, human-sounding emails — 4-6 sentences, no spam words, personalized to what the company actually does
Integrated Gmail OAuth2 so users can review and send emails directly from the tool — no copy-pasting
Added batch processing to handle 10+ prospects at once, follow-up sequences with different angles, and lead status tracking

results.label: Prospects processed in minutes via batch

testimonial.quote: Instead of spending my morning researching companies one by one, I paste 20 URLs and have personalized emails ready to send before my coffee is done. The emails sound like I actually spent time reading their website — because the AI did.
testimonial.name: Demo Project

title: RAGmind — Personal AI Assistant
subtitle: A self-hosted AI assistant that chats with your documents using any LLM provider
problem: Professionals drown in documents — PDFs, notes, code, research, internal wikis. When they need an answer, they spend 20-30 minutes digging through files. ChatGPT can't help because it doesn't know their private data. And cloud-based solutions mean sending confidential documents to third-party servers — a dealbreaker for lawyers, doctors, and security-conscious teams.
approach: Built a full RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) pipeline — documents are chunked, embedded with sentence-transformers, and stored in ChromaDB for instant cosine similarity search
Added support for 6 LLM providers (Groq, Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, DeepSeek, Mistral) so users choose their preferred model — including free options
Designed a knowledge persistence layer — notes, URLs, and uploads survive database clears because they're saved as files, not just vectors
Implemented security from the ground up — bcrypt password hashing, Fernet-encrypted API keys at rest, session-based auth with httpOnly cookies, rate-limited login, and file upload validation
Added media generation capabilities — AI image generation (FLUX.1, DALL-E 3, Stability AI) and video generation (Kling, Replicate, Luma AI) with background processing and status tracking
Built a complete user experience — multiple profiles, conversation history, voice input/output, dark/light themes, mobile responsive design, analytics dashboard with token cost tracking

testimonial.quote: RAGmind turns your scattered documents into an AI that actually knows your work. Ask it anything about your files, your notes, your research — it answers in seconds with source citations, using whatever LLM provider you prefer. No cloud, no subscriptions, completely private.
testimonial.name: Demo Project
